notes: POOL-LEVEL ONLY. Subscription lifecycle and per-period invariants are NOT modeled. Contract now enforces period-bound renewal salts (salt == keccak256(abi.encode(subscriptionId, completedPeriods+1))) and per-subscription held-balance escrow accounting (cancel refunds only the subscription's own held balance; sweepCancelledSubscription returns the last channel's remainder to the payer after cancellation). Subscription-level properties (active→cancelled transition, completedPeriods ≤ maxPeriods, per-period spend limits, EIP-712 authorization, per-subscription held-balance formula) require a subscription-aware model extension.

invariant_mapping.english: Total token balance held by the contract must never go negative.
Total held cannot exceed the practical supply cap.

not_checked: per-subscription held-balance accounting (heldBalance mapping; cancel/sweep refund isolation)
coverage.recommendation: Extend trusted core with a subscription_pool model that tracks per-subscription state (payer, payee, amountPerPeriod, completedPeriods, maxPeriods, active, totalDeposited, totalSpent, heldBalance) and subscription lifecycle invariants, including sum(heldBalance) ≤ pool balance and period-bound salt enforcement.
